review_text: I've slight dirmed a few occasions, find the stuff very helpful and pleasant. Amenities are very good, location is excellent
Very nice park but I would not recommend for Kids as there are a lot of smoking people and you can smell it from morning to night times.

Not my favorite. Campers are on top of each other and in each other’s business. So if you like that vibe, you’ll love it!!

GREAT for young families with kids! and would definitely recommend!
It’s just not for older folks looking to relax.

Bathrooms were awesome and clean! They offer en-suite pull throughs.

Laundry was great and clean!!!

Staff are incredibly helpful and accommodating!

For anyone wishing to know the price of an unpowered single vehicle camp site here in 2024, it is $43 per night. Since they don't have this info on their website, I'll list it here for them.

No, you cannot fit multiple vehicles on one site.

We had an amazing time at Big 4 Park Beach.  Great location, fantastic amenities, clean cabins. Toilets ate close and cleaned regularly. The kids enjoyed themselves and always had a smile. We will be hoing back.
Great spot for an overnight RV stop. Clean and tidy with all necessary facilities
I gave it a four-star rating due to the wrong directions on Google Maps. Caravan Holiday Park and Big 4 are the same. The caravan park is spacious, clean, and equipped with excellent amenities.
Very good,big red kidney bus is here,giving someone a chance to have a holiday 👍💕🌴🌴🌴5 minutes walk to the beach ⛱️ & coffs creek. Food options close by 🍽 .Enjoy your stay !
Great experience and welcoming staff. Would happily recommend
Usual , lack of large sites for all of us that have larger lenght vans.
Loved staying here, great facilities, staff and location
